step_rationale: Nitric oxide synthase; endothelial dysfunction in severe CAD.
mechanism: NOS1 dysregulation impairs nitric oxide production, promoting endothelial dysfunction and macrophage-endothelial interactions in atherosclerosis.

references.title: NOS1-mediated macrophage and endothelial cell interaction in the progression of atherosclerosis.
Construction of the gene expression subgroups of patients with coronary artery disease through bioinformatics approach.
Identification of gene variants related to the nitric oxide pathway in patients with acute coronary syndrome.
Nitric oxide system in needle-induced transmyocardial revascularization.
